response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio for 'I can't control myself' matches the provided Reference JSON. 'Rivals and Equals' and the introductory talk were manually transcribed as they were absent or incorrectly described in the reference. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the second song; the manual transcription mandate was applied to the first 3 minutes. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation for Mori's rapid rapping and fast-paced intro talk. Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onset.

subtitles.original: Best the weapon that you're hiding, come already or not?

subtitles.original: Another life and you would never get a second thought
subtitles.english: Another life and you would never get a second thought

subtitles.english: If I'm a fallen angel

subtitles.english: What does that make you?

subtitles.original: To see the same view
subtitles.english: To see the same view

subtitles.original: When it's your pride on the line
subtitles.english: When it's your pride on the line

subtitles.original: No one can save you from mine
subtitles.english: No one can save you from mine

subtitles.original: We're not rivals!
subtitles.english: We're not rivals!

subtitles.original: We're not equals!
subtitles.english: We're not equals!

subtitles.original: We're not rivals!
subtitles.english: We're not rivals!

subtitles.original: We're not equals!
subtitles.english: We're not equals!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、ハロー！
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone!

subtitles.original: あ、ありがとう！森カリオペです。
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you! I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: 森カリオペです！バースデーライブに来てくれて本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: I'm Mori Calliope! Thank you so much for coming to my birthday live!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグはここ、ここ、ここ！#UNCUTROCK です！
subtitles.english: The hashtag is right here! It's #UNCUTROCK!

subtitles.original: みんな、チェックしてね！
subtitles.english: Check it out, everybody!

subtitles.original: 今日のテーマはもちろん誕生日だよね？私の誕生日です。
subtitles.english: Today's theme is obviously birthday, right? It's my birthday.

subtitles.original: 後ろを見て、石があるよ！なんてこった！
subtitles.english: If you look behind us, we've got stones! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: どんな石かな？ゲストによって誕生石が変わるのかも？
subtitles.english: What kind of stones, I wonder? Maybe birthday stones depending on the guest?

subtitles.original: まあ、森カリオペはダイヤモンドだから。
subtitles.english: Well, Mori Calliope is diamond.

subtitles.original: だから、後ろにはもちろん白が見えるはずだよ。
subtitles.english: So, of course, you will see white behind me.

subtitles.original: そう！ゲストと一緒にオリジナル曲を歌ったり、自分の曲を歌ったりするんだ。
subtitles.english: Yes! The idea is to sing original songs with guests, and also my own songs.

subtitles.original: 今、コメントを見てるよ。
subtitles.english: I'm looking at the comments right now.

subtitles.original: 画質があまり良くないから、結構ラグがあるね。
subtitles.english: The quality isn't very high, so there's a pretty big lag.

subtitles.original: でも見てるよ...拍手の絵文字がいっぱいだ！
subtitles.english: But I'm looking... Phew, there's a lot of clapping!

subtitles.original: なんてこった！本当にその通りだね。
subtitles.english: Holy cannoli! Holy cannoli is right.

subtitles.original: こんばんは、こんばんは！
subtitles.english: Good evening, good evening!

subtitles.original: コメント見てます！
subtitles.english: I'm looking at the comments!

subtitles.original: うわあ、すごい！ハッピーバースデー、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! Happy birthday, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: お祝いの言葉、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you for the happy birthday wishes!

subtitles.original: それから、後ろにあるのは石だけじゃないんだ。
subtitles.english: And you know what? Behind me is not only stones...

subtitles.original: 素晴らしいバンドも参加してくれてるよ！
subtitles.english: ...but I also have a fabulous band joining me!

subtitles.original: そう、生バンドだよ！
subtitles.english: Yes, that's right! Live band!

subtitles.original: 来てくれたバンドの皆、本当にありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you so much to the band for coming.

subtitles.original: 特に、私たちが本当に尊敬している方が来ているんだ。
subtitles.english: In particular, we have somebody that Calliope and I really respect.

subtitles.original: 今日はパークさんが一緒にいてくれます！
subtitles.english: Today Park-san is here with us!

subtitles.original: カリちゃん、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Calli-chan, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: 今日はよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to today!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to it too!

subtitles.original: パークさんは今までで一番好きなベーシストの一人なんだ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, Park-san is one of my favorite bass players ever.

subtitles.original: 私の曲も2曲やってくれたんだ、OrpheusとSepia。
subtitles.english: He's done two songs for me, in particular, Orpheus and Sepia.

subtitles.original: OrpheusとSepiaのベースを弾いてくれました。
subtitles.english: He played the bass for Orpheus and Sepia.

subtitles.original: パークさんは本当にリスペクトしてます。はい。
subtitles.english: I respect Park-san a lot. Yes.

subtitles.original: バンドには他にも素晴らしいメンバーがいるし、ゲストもいるんだ。
subtitles.english: But I have so many wonderful members in the band today, and guests as well.

subtitles.original: あんまり時間を取らせたくないんだけど...
subtitles.english: I don't want to take up too much more time, but...

subtitles.original: とにかく、ゲストと一緒に歌い始めないとね。
subtitles.english: Anyway, we should probably sing with guests...

subtitles.original: 皆で練習してきた成果を見せたいから。
subtitles.english: ...because I want to showcase all that we've been practicing together.

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、始めよう！
subtitles.english: So, let's go ahead and begin!

subtitles.original: 最初の...最初のゲスト、おいで！
subtitles.english: The first... the first guest, come on!

subtitles.original: I can't control myself
subtitles.english: [Song: I can't control myself]

subtitles.english: The closed world, the sound I can faintly hear

subtitles.english: Like we're the only two in the world

subtitles.original: 届きそうな手 すれ違った心が
subtitles.english: Reaching hands, hearts that passed each other by

subtitles.original: ちょっと 痛むんだ
subtitles.english: They hurt a little

subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.original: ここで待って
subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.english: I can't decide

subtitles.english: and the confusion overflows

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 零れた想いを 数えて
subtitles.english: Counting the spilled feelings

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've repeated it so many times

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: World, world, waiting for it to open

subtitles.original: 壊れた世界
subtitles.english: The broken world

subtitles.original: 周り続ける針は
subtitles.english: The needle keeps spinning

subtitles.original: ちぎれた意識
subtitles.english: connecting the torn consciousness

subtitles.original: 繋いでいく
subtitles.english: and joining it together

subtitles.original: 歪んだ金属音
subtitles.english: Distorted metallic sound

subtitles.original: 鳴り響く
subtitles.english: it rings out

subtitles.original: 心にちょっと
subtitles.english: it echoes in my heart

subtitles.original: 響くんだ
subtitles.english: a little

subtitles.original: ここで待って
subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.original: ここで待って
subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.original: ここで待って
subtitles.english: Wait here

subtitles.original: 記憶繋げないまま
subtitles.english: Without connecting the memories
